metadata.notes: Initial rendering for all 30 teams. Data current through 2026 NBA Trade Deadline (Feb 5, 2026). To be refined.

picks.swapCondition: Part of SAS/ATL/CLE/MIN/UTA swap scenario. SAS gets most favorable of SAS or ATL.
picks.notes: ATL receives more favorable of: (less favorable of ATL/SAS) vs (less favorable of CLE and more favorable of UTA top-8/MIN).
ATL receives MORE FAVORABLE of MIL 2026 1st and NOP 2026 1st. MIL receives less favorable.
Part of 2026 2nd round Celtics group pool. ATL receives least favorable of ATL/LAC 2026 2nds.
ATL receives SAS 2027 1st as part of the 2026 swap arrangement.
ATL retains own 2027 2nd (reacquired in Hawks-Trail Blazers trade Feb 1, 2026).

picks.swapCondition: ATL gets more favorable of ATL and (less favorable of CLE/UTA). Complex swap with CLE and UTA.
picks.notes: Complex swap arrangement involving ATL, CLE, UTA for 2028 1st.

picks.swapCondition: Most favorable of ATL/MIA 2029 2nd goes to CHA via OKC. ATL may retain less favorable.
picks.notes: OKC traded most favorable of Hawks/Heat 2029 2nd to Hornets (Thunder-Hornets Dieng deal Feb 4, 2026).
ATL receives NYK 2030 2nd via Hawks-Trail Blazers trade (Feb 1, 2026).
ATL own 2031 2nd; conditional swap with HOU 2031 2nd (31-55 range).
ATL receives LAL 2032 2nd via Lakers-Hawks trade (Feb 5, 2026 Luke Kennard deal).
BOS receives MOST FAVORABLE of DET/MIL/ORL 2026 2nds. Magic gets 2nd-most; Pelicans get least.
BOS receives DEN 2027 2nd via Celtics-Bulls Anfernee Simons trade (Feb 5, 2026).

picks.swapCondition: SAS can swap picks 2-30 with BOS 2028 1st.
picks.notes: BOS retains own 2028 1st. SAS holds swap right (positions 2-30).
BOS receives NYK 2028 2nd if it lands picks 46-60.
BOS 2029 1st traded to POR. POR gets most and least favorable of BOS/MIL/POR pool; WAS gets middle.
BOS receives CHA 2030 2nd (top-55 protected) via Celtics-Hornets Xavier Tillman trade (Feb 5, 2026). Conveyed only if picks 56-60.
BKN 2026 2nd traded to Heat (top-55 protected). If top-55, BKN keeps it.
BKN receives pick from Celtics/Pacers group 2026 2nd pool.

picks.swapCondition: HOU holds swap right — if BKN 2027 1st is more favorable, HOU can swap.
picks.notes: HOU-BKN trade (6/26/2024). Houston controls swap right.

picks.swapCondition: NYK has swap right with BKN 2028 1st. Two most favorable of BKN/PHI(9-30)/PHX go to BKN.
picks.notes: BKN 2028 1st is best of BKN/PHI(9-30)/PHX pool. PHI 1-8 goes to OKC.
BKN receives LEAST FAVORABLE of HOU/DAL/PHX 2029 1st pool. HOU gets 2 most favorable.
BKN receives DEN 2032 1st (Nuggets-Nets Hunter Tyson trade, Feb 5, 2026).
BKN receives DEN 2032 2nd (Nuggets-Nets Hunter Tyson trade, Feb 5, 2026).
BKN receives TOR 2032 2nd via Raptors-Nets-Clippers Chris Paul trade (Feb 5, 2026).
CHA retains own 2026 1st. Receives LEAST FAVORABLE of MEM/ORL/WAS(top-8)/PHX pool.
CHA 2026 2nd: SAC receives if 31-55; DET receives if 56-60.
CHA receives LEAST FAVORABLE of ORL/BOS 2027 2nds via Hornets-Magic Tyus Jones trade (Feb 4, 2026).
CHA receives ORL 2028 2nd via Hornets-Magic Tyus Jones trade (Feb 4, 2026).
CHA receives MOST FAVORABLE of ATL/MIA 2029 2nds via Thunder-Hornets Dieng trade (Feb 4, 2026).
CHA 2030 2nd traded to BOS (top-55 protected) via Celtics-Hornets Xavier Tillman trade (Feb 5, 2026).
CHI receives POR 2026 1st (top-14 protected). If top-14, rolls to POR 2027 1st (top-14 protected).
CHI receives MOST FAVORABLE of NYK/MIN/POR/NOP 2026 2nds.
CHI receives LEAST FAVORABLE of DEN/GSW 2026 2nds (Bulls-Timberwolves Ayo Dosunmu trade Feb 5, 2026).
Rolls forward if POR 2026 1st not conveyed (top-14 protected).
CHI receives DEN 2027 2nd via three-team Cavaliers-Kings-Bulls trade (Feb 1, 2026).
CHI receives CLE 2027 2nd via Bulls-Timberwolves Ayo Dosunmu trade (Feb 5, 2026).
CHI 2027 2nd traded to Mavericks via Mavericks-Wizards-Hornets three-team trade (Feb 5, 2026).
CHI receives LEAST FAVORABLE of DET/MIL/NYK 2029 2nds via Cavaliers-Kings-Bulls trade (Feb 1, 2026).
CHI receives DEN 2031 2nd via Bulls-Hornets Coby White trade (Feb 4, 2026).
CHI receives NYK 2031 2nd via Bulls-Hornets Coby White trade (Feb 4, 2026).
CHI receives MOST FAVORABLE of MIN/GSW 2031 2nds via Bulls-Timberwolves Dosunmu trade (Feb 5, 2026).
CHI receives MOST FAVORABLE of PHX/HOU 2032 2nds via Bulls-Timberwolves Dosunmu trade (Feb 5, 2026).

picks.swapCondition: Part of SAS/ATL/CLE/MIN/UTA swap scenario. CLE pick involved in determining ATL's 2026 pick.
picks.notes: CLE retains own 2026 1st. Less favorable of CLE and more favorable of UTA(top-8)/MIN goes to ATL pool.
CLE 2027 2nd traded to CHI via Bulls-Timberwolves Dosunmu trade (Feb 5, 2026).

picks.swapCondition: ATL gets more favorable of ATL vs (less favorable of CLE/UTA) for 2028 swap.
picks.notes: CLE 2028 1st in swap pool with ATL and UTA.
CLE 2031 2nd goes to UTA (Jazz received via various trades).
DAL 2026 2nd in OKC/DAL/PHI pool: OKC gets most favorable, HOU gets 2nd, SAS gets least.
DAL receives CHI 2027 2nd via Mavericks-Wizards-Hornets three-team trade (Feb 5, 2026).

picks.swapCondition: OKC can swap own 2028 1st for DAL 2028 1st if DAL's pick is more favorable.
picks.notes: DAL 2028 1st in swap with OKC. OKC holds swap right (OKC-DAL trade 2/8/2024).
DAL 2029 1st in HOU/DAL/PHX pool. HOU gets 2 most favorable; BKN gets least.
DEN 2026 2nd split in Celtics group pool and DEN/GSW pool going to ATL and CHI.
DEN 2026 2nd; CHI receives least favorable of DEN/GSW 2026 2nds.
DEN 2027 1st (top-5 protected) to OKC. Conveys 2+ years after DEN sends a 1st to ORL. If never conveyed, becomes DEN 2029 2nd.
DEN 2027 2nd to BOS via Celtics-Bulls Simons trade (Feb 5, 2026).
DEN 2027 2nd to CHI via Cavaliers-Kings-Bulls trade (Feb 1, 2026).
DEN 2029 1st (top-5 protected) to OKC. Conditional timing: 2+ years after DEN conveys first 1st to OKC. OKC-DEN trade 9/9/2023.
DEN 2031 2nd to CHI via Bulls-Hornets Coby White trade (Feb 4, 2026).
DEN 2032 1st to BKN via Nuggets-Nets Hunter Tyson trade (Feb 5, 2026).
DEN 2032 2nd to BKN via Nuggets-Nets Hunter Tyson trade (Feb 5, 2026).
DET 2026 2nd in pool with MIL/ORL: BOS gets most favorable, ORL gets 2nd-most, NOP gets least.
DET receives CHA 2026 2nd if it lands picks 56-60.
DET 2029 2nd in pool with MIL/NYK: most favorable to SAC, then to CHI as least favorable per Cavaliers-Kings-Bulls chain.
GSW 2026 2nd in pool with DEN: CHI gets least favorable via Bulls-Timberwolves trade (Feb 5, 2026).
GSW 2031 2nd in pool with MIN: CHI gets most favorable via Bulls-Timberwolves trade (Feb 5, 2026).
Top-4 protected for HOU. If #5-30 → enters OKC/LAC/HOU pool: OKC gets most favorable, PHI gets 2nd-most (McCain trade 02/05/2026), WAS gets least.
CHI 2026 2nd via Washington (Cam Whitmore trade HOU-WAS-NOP 6/26/2025).

picks.swapCondition: HOU holds swap right: if BKN 2027 1st is more favorable than HOU's own, HOU can swap. HOU-BKN trade 6/26/2024.
picks.notes: HOU own 2027 1st plus BKN swap right.
PHX 2027 1st (unprotected, via BKN — KD/Harden trade chain). HOU-BKN trade 6/26/2024.

picks.swapCondition: HOU can swap own 2027 1st for BKN 2027 1st if BKN pick is more favorable.
picks.notes: HOU holds swap right on BKN 2027 1st.
HOU receives 2 MOST favorable of HOU/DAL/PHX 2029 1sts. BKN receives least. BKN-HOU trade 6/26/2024.
DAL 2029 1st in HOU/DAL/PHX pool — HOU gets 2 most favorable.
PHX 2029 1st in HOU/DAL/PHX pool — HOU gets 2 most favorable.
IND 2026 2nd in Celtics/Pacers/Hawks/Heat/Clippers group pool. MEM gets most favorable of LAC or best of BOS/IND/MIA; Nets and Nuggets get others.
LAC 2026 1st (Paul George trade) in OKC/LAC/HOU pool: OKC gets most favorable, PHI gets 2nd-most (McCain trade), WAS gets least.
LAC 2026 2nd in Celtics group pool. ATL receives least favorable of ATL/LAC 2026 2nds.

picks.swapCondition: OKC can swap more favorable of OKC own/DEN(6-30) for LAC 2027 1st. OKC-LAC trade 2/5/2026.
picks.notes: OKC holds swap right on LAC 2027 1st.
LAL 2032 2nd traded to ATL via Lakers-Hawks trade (Feb 5, 2026 Luke Kennard deal).
MEM 2026 1st in WAS/PHX/ORL/MEM/CHA pool: MEM receives most favorable of MEM/ORL and least favorable of WAS(top-8)/PHX. CHA gets least overall.
MEM receives most favorable of LAC or best of BOS/IND/MIA 2026 2nds from Celtics group pool.
MIA receives BKN 2026 2nd (top-55 protected). If BKN pick lands top-55, BKN keeps it.
MIA 2026 2nd in Celtics group pool going to MEM.

picks.swapCondition: Most favorable of ATL/MIA 2029 2nd goes to CHA via OKC (Thunder-Hornets Dieng deal Feb 4, 2026).
picks.notes: MIA 2029 2nd in pool with ATL; most favorable goes to CHA.
MIL 2026 1st in pool with ATL/NOP. ATL gets most favorable of MIL/NOP; MIL gets less favorable.
MIL 2026 2nd in pool with DET/ORL: BOS gets most favorable, ORL gets 2nd, NOP gets least.
MIL 2029 1st in BOS/MIL/POR pool: POR gets most and least favorable; WAS gets middle.
MIL 2029 2nd in pool with DET/NYK: most favorable to SAC, then CHI gets least favorable.

picks.swapCondition: Part of SAS/ATL/CLE/MIN/UTA swap scenario. MIN pick involved in pool determining ATL's 2026 pick.
picks.notes: MIN own 2026 1st — part of complex 5-team swap scenario involving SAS, ATL, CLE, UTA.
MIN 2026 2nd in NYK/MIN/POR/NOP pool: CHI gets most favorable.
MIN 2031 2nd in pool with GSW: CHI gets most favorable via Bulls-Timberwolves Dosunmu trade (Feb 5, 2026).
NOP 2026 1st in pool with MIL: ATL gets most favorable of MIL/NOP, MIL gets less favorable.
NOP 2026 2nd in pool with DET/MIL/ORL: NOP gets least favorable.
NOP receives pick from NYK/MIN/POR/NOP 2026 2nd pool (SAS gets least of POR/NOP, WAS gets 2nd-least overall).
NYK 2026 2nd in NYK/MIN/POR/NOP pool: CHI gets most favorable, NYK gets least favorable of NYK/MIN.

picks.swapCondition: NYK has swap right with BKN 2028 1st.
picks.notes: NYK retains own 2028 1st. Also holds swap right on BKN's 2028 1st.
NYK 2028 2nd traded split: BOS receives if 46-60; BKN receives if 46-60 (separate obligations).
NYK 2029 2nd in pool with DET/MIL: most favorable to SAC, least to CHI.
NYK 2030 2nd traded to ATL via Hawks-Trail Blazers trade (Feb 1, 2026).
NYK 2031 2nd traded to CHI via Bulls-Hornets Coby White trade (Feb 4, 2026).
OKC own 2026 1st in 3-pick pool (OKC/LAC/HOU). OKC receives most favorable; PHI receives 2nd-most (McCain trade 02/05/2026); WAS gets least.
LAC 2026 1st (Paul George trade) in OKC/LAC/HOU pool.
PHI 2026 1st (top-4 protected 2026/2027). If not conveyed by 2027, becomes PHI 2027 2nd. OKC-PHI trade 9/2/2022.
UTA 2026 1st (top-8 protected). Extinguishes entirely if not conveyed — no rollover. OKC-UTA trade 7/7/2021.
OKC gets most favorable of OKC/DAL/PHI 2026 2nds. HOU gets 2nd-most; SAS gets least.

picks.swapCondition: OKC holds swap right with LAC 2027 1st using more favorable of OKC own/DEN(6-30). OKC-LAC trade 2/5/2026.
picks.notes: OKC own 2027 1st plus swap right vs LAC.
DEN 2027 1st (top-5 protected). Conveys 2+ years after DEN conveys a 1st to ORL. If never, becomes DEN 2029 2nd. OKC-DEN trade 9/9/2023.
SAS 2027 1st (top-16 protected, via SAC). Acquired at 2025 draft. OKC-SAC-SAS trade 6/25/2025.

picks.swapCondition: OKC can swap more favorable of OKC own/DEN(6-30) for LAC 2027 1st.
picks.notes: OKC holds swap right on LAC 2027 1st. OKC-LAC trade 2/5/2026.

picks.swapCondition: OKC can swap own 2028 1st for DAL 2028 1st if DAL pick is more favorable.
picks.notes: OKC own 2028 1st plus DAL swap right. OKC-DAL trade 2/8/2024.

picks.swapCondition: OKC can swap own 2028 1st for DAL 2028 1st if DAL's pick is more favorable.
picks.notes: OKC holds swap right on DAL 2028 1st. OKC-DAL trade 2/8/2024.
DEN 2029 1st (top-5 protected). Conditional: 2+ years after DEN conveys first 1st to OKC. OKC-DEN trade 9/9/2023.
ORL 2026 1st in WAS/PHX/ORL/MEM/CHA pool: MEM gets most favorable of MEM/ORL; CHA gets least.
ORL 2026 2nd in pool with DET/MIL: ORL receives 2nd-most favorable (BOS gets most, NOP gets least).
ORL 2027 2nd in pool with BOS: CHA gets least favorable (Hornets-Magic Tyus Jones trade Feb 4, 2026).
ORL 2028 2nd traded to CHA via Hornets-Magic Tyus Jones trade (Feb 4, 2026).
PHI 2026 1st (top-4 protected 2026/2027) to OKC. If not conveyed by 2027, becomes PHI 2027 2nd. OKC-PHI trade 9/2/2022.
PHI receives 2nd-most favorable pick from OKC/LAC/HOU 2026 pool via McCain trade (Feb 5, 2026).
PHI 2026 2nd in OKC/DAL/PHI pool: OKC gets most favorable, HOU gets 2nd, SAS gets least.
PHI retains own 2027 2nd (would be owed to OKC if 2026 PHI 1st not conveyed, but that obligation is structured differently).
PHI 2028 1st: if PHI 1-8, goes to OKC; if PHI 9-30, goes to BKN pool. Two most favorable of BKN/PHI(9-30)/PHX go to BKN.
PHX 2026 1st in WAS/PHX/ORL/MEM/CHA pool. WAS gets more favorable of WAS(top-8)/PHX; MEM gets most of MEM/ORL; CHA gets least.
PHX 2027 1st (unprotected, via BKN — KD/Harden trade chain) to HOU. HOU-BKN trade 6/26/2024.
PHX 2028 1st in BKN/PHI(9-30)/PHX pool: BKN gets two most favorable. OKC gets PHI(1-8).
PHX 2029 1st in HOU/DAL/PHX pool: HOU gets 2 most favorable, BKN gets least. BKN-HOU trade 6/26/2024.
PHX 2032 2nd in pool with HOU: CHI gets most favorable via Bulls-Timberwolves Dosunmu trade (Feb 5, 2026).
POR 2026 1st (top-14 protected) owed to CHI. If top-14, rolls to POR 2027 1st (top-14 protected).
POR 2026 2nd in NYK/MIN/POR/NOP pool: CHI gets most favorable.
POR 2027 1st (top-14 protected) owed to CHI if 2026 pick not conveyed.
POR receives most and least favorable of BOS/MIL/POR 2029 1st pool; WAS gets the middle pick.
POR receives most and least favorable of BOS/MIL/POR pool. MIL 2029 1st part of this pool.
POR own 2029 1st — part of BOS/MIL/POR pool where POR gets most and least favorable.
SAC receives CHA 2026 2nd if it lands 31-55; DET receives if 56-60.
SAC receives most favorable of DET/MIL/NYK 2029 2nds via Cavaliers-Kings-Bulls chain. SAC then sends least favorable to CHI.
SAC 2029 2nd traded to HOU via Cam Whitmore trade.

picks.swapCondition: SAS receives most favorable of SAS or ATL 2026 1st in 5-team swap scenario (SAS/ATL/CLE/MIN/UTA).
picks.notes: SAS gets best of SAS or ATL pick in complex 5-team swap pool.
SAS receives least favorable of OKC/DAL/PHI 2026 2nds. Also receives some picks from NYK/MIN/POR/NOP pool (least of POR/NOP).
SAS 2027 1st goes to ATL as part of the 2026 swap arrangement.

picks.swapCondition: SAS holds swap right on BOS 2028 1st (positions 2-30).
picks.notes: SAS retains own 2028 1st plus holds swap right on BOS 2028 1st.
TOR 2032 2nd traded to BKN via Raptors-Nets-Clippers Chris Paul three-team trade (Feb 5, 2026).
UTA 2026 1st (top-8 protected) to OKC. Extinguishes entirely if not conveyed — no rollover. OKC-UTA trade 7/7/2021.

picks.swapCondition: UTA 2028 1st in swap pool with ATL and CLE. ATL gets more favorable of ATL vs (less favorable of CLE/UTA).

picks.notes: UTA receives CLE 2031 2nd via various trade arrangements.
WAS 2026 1st (top-8 protected) in WAS/PHX/ORL/MEM/CHA pool. If top-8, WAS keeps it; if 9-30, goes to pool where MEM gets most favorable of MEM/ORL and WAS(9-30)/PHX.
WAS receives LEAST FAVORABLE of OKC/LAC/HOU 2026 1st pool (McCain trade Feb 5, 2026 chain).
WAS 2026 2nd traded to HOU via Cam Whitmore trade (HOU-WAS-NOP 6/26/2025).
WAS receives the middle pick from BOS/MIL/POR 2029 1st pool (POR gets most and least; WAS gets middle).
WAS 2029 2nd traded to HOU via Cam Whitmore trade.
